summary: Verified the ClawSweeper commit finding against openclaw/openclaw main at 92418fc9da1a5837c9770a2a7366e83d87de2fd3. The release smoke script still writes plugins.allow in both installed and dev paths without setting plugins.slots.memory to 'none', while plugin normalization still defaults an unset memory slot to memory-core. This is a narrow non-security reliability fix suitable for a new Clownfish fix PR.
